definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: His conduct was unprofessional.]

definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The manner in which a person behaves, especially in a particular place or situation.]

definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The organization of the different elements of a complex body or activity so as to enable them to work together effectively.]

definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: A long-established custom or belief passed down from one generation to another.]
